name: Farmers Savings Bank
description_short: Community bank established in 1917 offering mortgages, business loans, deposit products, and mobile banking with local branch presence.
description_long:
Farmers Savings Bank was founded in 1917 and has operated as a community-focused financial institution for over a century. The bank emphasizes its heritage of serving local communities, businesses, and citizens through reinvestment and long-term commitment to the regions it serves. The bank operates physical branch locations while also maintaining modern digital banking capabilities.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of consumer and business banking products including mortgage lending (30, 20, and 15-year fixed-rate mortgages), business and agricultural loans, deposit products (savings accounts and CDs), online banking, mobile banking, debit cards with mobile wallet support, and Zelle money transfer services. Their mortgage rates are prominently displayed on their website, with current offerings ranging from 5.875% to 6.125% depending on loan term, advertised with 0% points.

Farmers Savings Bank differentiates itself through emphasis on personalized service, local decision-making, and community reinvestment. The bank positions itself as offering "old school values with new school ways," combining traditional relationship banking with modern digital tools. They highlight their role as a "community pillar" and stress that high-quality customer service is their primary mission, rather than pure profit maximization.

As of the latest website announcement, Farmers Savings Bank has entered into a definitive agreement to be acquired by Bank CMG, which represents a significant structural change for the institution. Customers are advised to expect business as usual during the regulatory review period. This acquisition pending status is an important consideration for new customers evaluating long-term banking relationships. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: 30, 20, and 15-year fixed-rate mortgage lending for home purchases
Business and agricultural loan products for various business sizes
Business online banking with custom financial management system
Mobile wallet support for debit card payments
Online banking with alerts and notifications
Customer contact and service via multiple physical locations
pros: Over 100 years of community banking history and established local presence with multiple physical branch locations
Modern digital banking platform including mobile banking available 24/7, mobile wallet support, and Zelle integration
Mortgage lending with competitive fixed rates (5.875%-6.125%) and transparent rate/APR disclosure
Business and agricultural loan products specifically designed for local business growth
Commitment to community reinvestment and personalized customer service emphasizing relationship banking
Multiple deposit products including CDs with rates promoted as competitive
Online banking alerts and customized financial solutions for both individuals and businesses
cons: Pending acquisition by Bank CMG creates uncertainty about future service quality, rates, and product offerings post-merger
Limited geographic service area appears focused on Wisconsin (specifically mentioned Iowa County, WI), restricting accessibility for non-local customers
Mortgage rates shown (5.875%-6.125%) are not notably competitive compared to national lenders as of current market conditions
Website does not clearly disclose deposit insurance coverage limits, FDIC status, or other regulatory protections
No mention of credit cards, personal loans, or consumer credit products beyond mortgages and business lending
best_for: Wisconsin residents seeking local relationship banking with personalized service and community focus
Small business owners and agricultural operators needing customized business or farm loans with local decision-making
Home buyers in Wisconsin seeking fixed-rate mortgages from an established local lender
Customers who value brick-and-mortar branch access combined with modern mobile banking capabilities
diagnosis: Farmers Savings Bank is best for Wisconsin residents and small business owners seeking personalized community banking with local branch access and relationship-based service. The primary caveat is the pending acquisition by Bank CMG, which creates uncertainty about whether the bank will maintain its current service model, rates, and community focus post-merger—new customers should clarify their expectations regarding this transition.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
